description_long: This is a heavily worn, traditional football with a classic black-and-white pentagon-hexagon panel design. The surface is covered in numerous scuffs, scratches, and dirt marks, indicating extensive use on rough outdoor surfaces. Several panels show significant discoloration and abrasions, with one white panel almost entirely stripped of its outer layer. Faint branding and text are visible on some black panels, though much of it is faded or obscured by wear. The seams between panels are still visible, suggesting a stitched construction, and the ball appears slightly misshapen from prolonged use. The overall appearance suggests this football has seen many games in urban parks or streets.
description: A heavily worn black-and-white football with scuffed, scratched panels and faded branding, showing signs of extensive outdoor use.
description_view_0: This view shows a dirty, scuffed football with visible black pentagonal panels and faded branding on one panel.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a white panel with severe abrasion, exposing the underlying material, and heavy surface scratches.
description_view_2: This side displays more dirt and scuff marks, with the black panels showing less branding and more wear.
description_view_3: This view reveals branding and text on a white panel, with visible seams and a generally rough, dirty surface.
